problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis — specifically BDNF upregulation to — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
